name: Peanut Brittle Deluxe
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, corn syrup, and water in a heavy 3-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches the soft crack stage (285°F) on the candy thermometer.
4. Add the peanuts and butter; cook, stirring constantly, to the hard crack stage (300°F) on the candy thermometer.
5. Remove from heat. Rapidly stir in the baking soda and vanilla. The mixture will foam up.
6. Turn the mixture onto 2 greased baking sheets (Jelly roll pans work nicely).
7. Spread out with a metal spatula as thin as possible.
8. When the candy begins to set, loosen from the baking sheets.
9. Turn the brittle over, then stretch and pull the brittle as thin as possible using two forks.
10. Allow it to cool completely before breaking into pieces.
Makes about 2 pounds of brittle.
